title: Cornerstone Friday Night Meeting
description: Our regular weekly open discussion meeting. All are welcome — whether you're new to recovery or have been on this path for years. Come as you are.

title: Spring Speaker Series Begins
description: Kicking off our spring speaker series! Each week we'll hear from a different member of the recovery community sharing their experience, strength, and hope.

title: Area Service Conference — Volunteers Needed
description: The Massachusetts Area 30 Service Conference is looking for volunteers. This is a great opportunity to give back and connect with the wider AA community. Contact us if you're interested in helping out.

title: Welcome to Our New Website!
description: We're excited to launch our new Coolidge Cornerstone website. Here you'll find meeting info, upcoming events, and resources for recovery. Bookmark this page and check back often for updates!

title: Big Book Study Group Starting April
description: A new Big Book study group will meet before our regular Friday session starting in April. This is a great way to deepen your understanding of the program. Open to all.
